column3: Some laser toner cartridges include the OPC drum.
column4:
Distinction

This is compact term recall. Handling cautions are tested with Basic cards.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.43; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column9: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Cloze Printer Laser OPC Source::Messer-v170

column2: CMYK stands for {{c1::cyan, magenta, yellow, and key}}.
column3: In printer context, key refers to black.
column4:
Why

CMYK recall supports inkjet cartridge replacement and color identification.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column9: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Cloze HighYield Printer Inkjet CMYK Source::Messer-v170

column2: Thermal printer paper changes color when exposed to {{c1::heat}}.
column3: The printer's heating element creates output on special thermal paper.
column4:
Distinction

Thermal printers do not use ink or toner for normal output.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column9: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Cloze Printer Thermal Paper Source::Messer-v170

column2: Impact printers are useful for {{c1::multipart forms}} because the printhead strikes through copies.
column3: The top-sheet impact is duplicated on pages underneath.
column4:
Why

Multipart forms are the practical reason impact printers still appear in some environments.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.45; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column9: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Cloze HighYield Printer Impact Multipart Source::Messer-v170

column2: Tractor-feed paper uses side holes that must align with the {{c1::tractor feed}}.
column3: The alignment keeps continuous forms moving through an impact printer.
column4:
Distinction

This is paper-feed recall. Maintenance decisions about replacing paper are tested with Basic cards.
